interventions.name: P1 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: sequence enactment routines that compare correct and incorrect command orders

interventions.name: P1 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: goal-versus-step prompts that force executable action language

interventions.name: P1 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: step-tracing supports that highlight the current command and next command explicitly

interventions.name: P1 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: bug-and-revision talk that requires naming the broken step before changing it
